is_note_with_octave.name: is_note_with_octave
is_note_with_octave.description: Returns a boolean value indicating whether the given value is a name with octave.

letter_name_to_midi_note.name: letter_name_to_midi_note
letter_name_to_midi_note.description: Converts a letter name to its corresponding MIDI note. The letter name is represented in standard pitch notation. Examples are "A5", "Db3", "C#7". Refer to this mapping from letter name to midi notes.

midi_note_to_frequency.name: midi_note_to_frequency
midi_note_to_frequency.description: Converts a note to its corresponding frequency.

letter_name_to_frequency.name: letter_name_to_frequency
letter_name_to_frequency.description: Converts a name to its corresponding frequency.

add_octave_to_note.name: add_octave_to_note
add_octave_to_note.description: Takes the given Note and adds the octave number to it.

get_octave.name: get_octave
get_octave.description: Gets the octave number from a given name with octave.

get_note_name.name: get_note_name
get_note_name.description: Gets the letter name from a given name with octave (without the accidental).

get_accidental.name: get_accidental
get_accidental.description: Gets the accidental from a given name with octave.

key_signature_to_key.name: key_signature_to_key
key_signature_to_key.description: Converts the key signature to the corresponding key

ionian_scale.name: ionian_scale
ionian_scale.description: Generate a list of MIDI notes representing the major scale for the given key (including the octave)

major_scale.name: major_scale
major_scale.description: Generate a list of MIDI notes representing the major scale for the given key (including the octave)

dorian_scale.name: dorian_scale
dorian_scale.description: Generate a list of MIDI notes representing the dorian scale for the given key (including the octave)

phrygian_scale.name: phrygian_scale
phrygian_scale.description: Generate a list of MIDI notes representing the phrygian scale for the given key (including the octave)

lydian_scale.name: lydian_scale
lydian_scale.description: Generate a list of MIDI notes representing the lydian scale for the given key (including the octave)

mixolydian_scale.name: mixolydian_scale
mixolydian_scale.description: Generate a list of MIDI notes representing the mixolydian scale for the given key (including the octave)

aeolian_scale.name: aeolian_scale
aeolian_scale.description: Generate a list of MIDI notes representing the minor scale for the given key (including the octave)

minor_scale.name: minor_scale
minor_scale.description: Generate a list of MIDI notes representing the minor scale for the given key (including the octave)

locrian_scale.name: locrian_scale
locrian_scale.description: Generate a list of MIDI notes representing the locrian scale for the given key (including the octave)
